name: t4mem
description: Branchable, durable agent memory for explainable work

interface.shortDescription: Branchable agent memory with explainable decisions
interface.longDescription: Bring t4mem into Codex as a local plugin that bundles the agent-memory skill and the local MCP server for durable, branchable, explainable working memory.
defaultPrompt: Summarize the current task from durable memory
Trace why we made this decision
Record an observation and preserve it as durable memory when stable
